t-1.notes: feature: phase identity · phase.Dir @ internal/phase/phase.go · resolves legacy NN-slug ids; adds slug ordering/display-number/unique-slug helpers

t-2.notes: feature: phase lifecycle · milestonePhaseOrder @ internal/cmd/phase.go · phase list orders by milestone array via phase.Ordered

t-3.notes: feature: phase lifecycle · phaseCreate @ internal/cmd/phase.go · create makes bare-slug dirs, appends to milestone array, drops ordinal numbering

t-4.notes: feature: phase lifecycle · phaseNumber @ internal/cmd/phase.go · dross phase number + status N-of-M + execute.md patch-digit wiring, all via DisplayNumber

t-5.notes: feature: phase lifecycle · phaseMigrate @ internal/cmd/migrate.go · idempotent NN-slug→slug migration, skips in-flight phase, disambiguates/refuses collisions

t-6.notes: feature: phase lifecycle · dross phase migrate (applied) · this repo's 13 settled phases renamed to bare slugs; milestone arrays stripped; phase 14 deferred as in-flight
